title: sourceview.generate
description: Create a reviewable filesystem plan that generates (first-materializes) a WBPP/PixInsight-ready project source view: the project's selected light frames plus their matched calibration, laid out per the selected workflow profile, as per-item link actions (copy only with explicit opt-in). The response planId enters the standard spec 017/025 pipeline (approve → apply); nothing is written to disk before apply. The PreparedSourceView record (spec 026) is written on successful apply. Link kind is resolved deterministically per drive-scope from the settings pair (source_view_link_kind_intra_drive / source_view_link_kind_cross_drive) and recorded per item. Allowed only when the owning project lifecycle is setup_incomplete|ready|prepared|processing|blocked|completed; refused on archived with lifecycle.read_only (spec 026 FR-012).

projectId.description: Project whose selected lights + matched calibration are materialized.

profileId.description: Workflow/processing profile selecting the tree layout (spec 011). Defaults to the project's active profile (WBPP first). Layout is profile-driven, never hardcoded.

destinationOverride.description: Optional per-generation destination path. Default is the project envelope subfolder <project>/source-views/<view>/ (spec 024). A persisted per-project override is applied when set and no per-generation override is provided.

copyOptIn.description: Explicit opt-in to copy materialization when no link kind is achievable. Default false — the app never silently copies (FR-003).

strict.description: When true, any missing/unresolved source fails the whole plan; when false (default), unresolved sources are skipped and flagged as warnings (FR-019).

planId.description: Identifier of the produced generation plan (a FilesystemPlan with origin prepared_view_generation, plan_type source_view_generation). Enters the standard spec 017/025 pipeline: approve then apply.

warnings.description: Non-blocking review warnings surfaced with the plan.

code.description: no_calibration_applied: light view generated without matched calibration, unmatched groups listed (FR-010a). unresolved_source: a source is missing/unresolved and was skipped/flagged (FR-019). capability_drift: a saved link kind was not achievable for a drive-scope and a documented fallback was applied (FR-004b). long_path: a destination path exceeds the Windows 260-char limit (FR-018).

no_link_kind: no achievable link kind and copyOptIn=false (FR-003/FR-004b). destination.collision: two sources resolve to the same destination path — refused, points at the offending pattern (FR-009a/FR-017). destination.exists: destination path is an existing user-owned file/folder — never silently overwritten (FR-016). lifecycle.read_only: project is archived (spec 026 FR-012).

pattern.description: For destination.collision: the layout pattern that produced the collision (missing session/night/setup token).
